entry.title: Lehar / Parlour Paper
entry.summary: The recent update to mainnet.observer includes a new feature: an [empty blocks dashboard](https://mainnet.observer/charts/blocks-empty/), which offers insights into the mining of empty blocks within the blockchain. This addition is instrumental in providing transparency and data analytics regarding block mining activities. Furthermore, the dashboard references a significant hypothesis regarding the prevalence of long empty blocks during 2015-2016, suggesting a potential covert ASIC boost optimization by Bitmain. This theory is detailed in a [2017 blog post by Bitmex Research](https://www.bitmex.com/blog/empty-block-data-by-mining-pool), which delves into the intricacies of mining practices and their implications on the network. The integration of such analytical tools and historical data provides a comprehensive perspective on mining behaviors and technological strategies that have influenced the blockchain ecosystem over time.
